text: This redesigned dataset is built from paired control images and target images.
pronounce_text: This redesigned dataset is built from paired control images and target images.

text: The control image is the input. In the ideal case, it contains a front-facing full-body reference and a back-facing full-body reference.That gives the model enough information about clothing, hair, colors, and accessories.
pronounce_text: The control image is the input. In the ideal case, it contains a front-facing full-body reference and a back-facing full-body reference.That gives the model enough information about clothing, hair, colors, and accessories.

text: During inference, even if only the front view is available, the model can sometimes infer a reasonable back side. But the more complete the control image is, the stronger the training signal becomes.
pronounce_text: During inference, even if only the front view is available, the model can sometimes infer a reasonable back side. But the more complete the control image is, the stronger the training signal becomes.

text: The target image is the output the model learns to generate. It includes a complete skin UV map, plus multiple 3D render views.
pronounce_text: The target image is the output the model learns to generate. It includes a complete skin UV map, plus multiple three D render views.

text: The top-left area contains the real UV texture. The top-right area includes a main preview and enlarged details.The bottom area contains inner-layer and outer-layer views from multiple directions, plus close-ups of the head.
pronounce_text: The top-left area contains the real UV texture. The top-right area includes a main preview and enlarged details.The bottom area contains inner-layer and outer-layer views from multiple directions, plus close-ups of the head.

text: To be clear, the Minecraft UV layout itself is fixed to the standard skin format, so we can extract a usable skin file reliably.
pronounce_text: To be clear, the Minecraft UV layout itself is fixed to the standard skin format, so we can extract a usable skin file reliably.

text: What is flexible is how we arrange the different panels inside the training target image.
pronounce_text: What is flexible is how we arrange the different panels inside the training target image.

text: The model cared less about whether the UV map was placed in the top-left or somewhere else, and more about how much useful information the target contained: the UV texture, rendered views,viewing-angle coverage, and clear UV-to-3D correspondence.
pronounce_text: The model cared less about whether the UV map was placed in the top-left or somewhere else, and more about how much useful information the target contained: the UV texture, rendered views,viewing-angle coverage, and clear UV, to, three D correspondence.
